name: Decode Ways
description: A message containing letters A-Z can be encoded as numbers 1-26 ('A'->1, 'B'->2, ..., 'Z'->26). Given a string s containing only digits, return the number of ways to decode it. '06' is not valid because '6' != '06'.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 100. s contains only digits and may contain leading zeros.

performance.stress_intent: separate linear decode DP from exponential split recursion using long runs of ambiguous 1-digits
